__comment: OPT-IN OVERLAY — not installed by default. Merge these hook entries into your .claude/settings.json AFTER installing claude-code-guardrails (https://github.com/uaziz1/claude-code-guardrails, MIT). These four Python hooks add threat-level command/secret guardrails that fire even under `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions` (which the toolkit's claude-session.sh uses). See the 'Threat-level guardrails' section of README.md. Do NOT copy guardrails' `permissions` block or `disableBypassPermissionsMode` here — they are bypassed under skip-permissions mode and the latter breaks claude-session.sh. The $HOME/.claude/hooks/*.py paths assume guardrails' own install.sh, which installs to ~/.claude/hooks/.
